nodes.name: Noon Request Spot (18:50 UTC / 11:50 AM AZ)
Evening Request Spot (02:50 UTC / 7:50 PM AZ)

meta.description: 2x/day scheduled listener request spots: at 11:50 AM and 7:50 PM AZ time, picks the oldest unplayed listener request from the request board, finds it in the MegaSeg library, and writes a playlist file to Dropbox for MegaSeg to inject at noon and 8 PM.
